summary: iOS 🟥 FALCON | Charge Stand is not properly displayed in "Software" tab if it is currently unplugged
scenario: Charge Stand name and image are replaced with placeholder in Device Settings > Software tab when unplugged from power
description_clean: When a Charge Stand is unplugged from power, it is not properly displayed in the Device Settings > Software tab. The name changes to match the headset name and the image is replaced with a placeholder. After plugging the Charge Stand back in, the page refreshes and displays correctly.
steps: 1. Open Poly Studio Mobile app on Android.
2. Navigate to Home screen and ensure a Charge Stand is connected to power and paired with a headset.
3. Go to Device Settings → [Charge Stand Name] → Software tab. Observe the Charge Stand name and image displayed correctly.
4. Unplug the Charge Stand from power.
5. Return to Device Settings → Software tab for the Charge Stand.
6. Observe the Charge Stand name and image in the Software tab.
expected: The Charge Stand name and image should remain correctly displayed in the Software tab even when unplugged from power.
actual: After unplugging the Charge Stand from power, the name changes to match the headset name and the image is replaced with a placeholder. After plugging the Charge Stand back in, the page refreshes and displays correctly.
